subject.process_description: A language model reviews incoming invoices against purchase orders and auto-approves matched items for payment up to $5,000.

consequence.verbatim: Incorrect approvals create direct financial loss and potential audit findings.

identity.verbatim: Model and tag pinned in the serving config.
mechanisms: Model tag pinned in deployment configuration

drift.verbatim: Language Model Tectonics runs daily via cron against pinned parameters.
mechanisms: Scheduled daily LMT run with default severity zones
Weekly sample review by accounts payable

recovery.verbatim: Discrepancies surface in the monthly reconciliation.
